package.name: nav_algo_smac_ros1
package.description: ROS 1 nav_core::BaseGlobalPlanner plugin wrapping the ported Nav2 Humble SmacPlannerLattice algorithm. Math is byte-identical to the Humble plugin (the algorithm core lives in nav_algo_core); this package only provides the move_base-side plumbing (parameter loading, costmap coupling, plan publishing).
